title: Guarding the Invisible Dragons
author: Tracey West
desc: A nest of invisible baby dragons needs magical fruit from a dangerous island before their powers fade! 👻

q.en: Where is the nest of baby Invisible Dragons found at the start of the story?
q.zh: 故事开头，隐身龙宝宝的巢穴是在哪里被发现的？

options.en: In Diego's seaside cottage according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 在迭戈的海边小屋（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: In one of Queen Sofia's castle towers
options.zh: 在索菲亚女王的城堡塔楼里

options.en: In the Valley of Clouds
In a cave on Dove Island
options.zh: 在多夫岛的一个山洞里

explain.en: Queen Sofia explains that one of her guards discovered the dragons' nest about a week earlier inside a castle tower.
explain.zh: 索菲亚女王说，大约一周前她的一名卫兵在城堡塔楼里发现了龙宝宝的巢穴。

q.en: Why must the baby Invisible Dragons eat fruit from the Dragon Tree?
q.zh: 隐身龙宝宝为什么必须吃龙树上的果实？

options.en: It makes them friendly to humans according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 让它们对人类友好（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: It makes them grow much bigger
It keeps their invisibility power before their third horn sprouts
options.zh: 能在第三只角长出前保住它们隐身的能力

options.en: It teaches them how to fly

explain.en: Diego reads that Invisible Dragons must eat the Dragon Tree fruit before their third horn sprouts, or they lose the ability to become visible at will.
explain.zh: 迭戈读到，隐身龙必须在第三只角长出前吃下龙树果实，否则就会失去随心隐身的能力。

q.en: Who travels with Drake and Worm to Dove Island?
q.zh: 谁和德雷克、沃姆一起前往多夫岛？

options.en: Diego
Val
Carlos
Queen Sofia

explain.en: Drake and Worm go, and Val insists on coming to help. Carlos and Diego stay at the castle to look after the other babies.
explain.zh: 德雷克和沃姆出发，瓦尔坚持要一起去帮忙。卡洛斯和迭戈留在城堡照顾其他龙宝宝。

q.en: How does the baby dragon Fig end up on Dove Island?
q.zh: 龙宝宝菲格是怎么到了多夫岛的？

options.en: The queen sends her there
She flies there all by herself
Carlos carries her in a bag according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 卡洛斯把它装在袋子里带去（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She secretly hitchhikes with Worm during transport
options.zh: 它在传送时偷偷搭了沃姆的顺风车

explain.en: Fig sneaks onto Worm during the magical transport and is discovered on the island, just like she later hitches a ride back.
explain.zh: 菲格在魔法传送时偷偷溜到沃姆身上，到了岛上才被发现，后来它又用同样的方式搭了回程的顺风车。

q.en: Why did Fig's parents, Tana and Yeray, leave the babies behind?
q.zh: 菲格的父母塔娜和耶拉伊为什么把宝宝们留下了？

options.en: They were captured by the queen according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它们被女王抓走了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They went to Dove Island to get the fruit that keeps their powers
options.zh: 它们去多夫岛取能保住能力的果实

options.en: They were afraid of the castle
They went to find Carlos

explain.en: Getting the fruit is a task that requires two Invisible Dragons, so both parents went to Dove Island together.
explain.zh: 取果实需要两只隐身龙一起完成，所以父母俩一同去了多夫岛。

q.en: What traps Fig's father, Yeray, on the island?
q.zh: 菲格的父亲耶拉伊在岛上被什么困住了？

options.en: Rocks from an avalanche
A toothy purple fish according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一条长牙的紫鱼（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A waterfall
A dense jungle

explain.en: While following the stream, an avalanche of rocks tumbled down the mountain and trapped Yeray underneath.
explain.zh: 顺着溪流行走时，山上的岩石雪崩般滚落，把耶拉伊压在了下面。

q.en: How does Val recognize Fig among the baby dragons?
q.zh: 瓦尔如何在龙宝宝中认出菲格？

options.en: Fig's face fins are solid blue-green while the others have purple in theirs
options.zh: 菲格脸边的鳍是纯蓝绿色，而其他几只有紫色

options.en: Fig is the biggest one
Fig already has three horns according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 菲格已经有三只角了（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Fig is bright pink

explain.en: Val notices that all of Fig's face fins are solid blue-green, while the other babies have some purple in their fins.
explain.zh: 瓦尔注意到菲格脸边的鳍全是蓝绿色，而其他宝宝鳍里带些紫色。

q.en: What danger guards the Dragon Tree's fruit?
q.zh: 守护龙树果实的危险是什么？

options.en: Toothy purple fish in the moat
options.zh: 护城河里长着尖牙的紫鱼

options.en: Shadow phantoms
A sleeping dragon according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一只沉睡的龙（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A griffin

explain.en: A moat surrounds the Dragon Tree, and large purple fish with sharp teeth leap out to snap at anyone who tries to cross.
explain.zh: 龙树四周有一条护城河，里面游着长着尖牙的大紫鱼，会扑出来咬试图过河的人。

q.en: How does Fig get across the moat to reach the fruit?
q.zh: 菲格是怎么越过护城河去够果实的？

options.en: She flies high over the moat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它高高地飞过护城河（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The fish carry her
Worm carries her across
She swims while Tana distracts the fish with a branch
options.zh: 塔娜用树枝引开鱼，它趁机游过去

explain.en: Tana becomes invisible and waves a branch over the water to distract the fish while Fig turns invisible and jumps across.
explain.zh: 塔娜隐身用树枝在水面引开鱼，菲格同时隐身跳过了护城河。

q.en: What surprising thing happens at the very end of the book?
q.zh: 故事最后发生了什么出人意料的事？

options.en: The dragons leave forever
Carlos moves into the castle according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 卡洛斯搬进了城堡（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Val is chosen by the Dragon Stone to be Fig's Dragon Master
options.zh: 龙石选择瓦尔成为菲格的驯龙师

options.en: Drake becomes king

explain.en: Griffith's Dragon Stone glows and reveals Val as Fig's Dragon Master because of the strong bond they formed.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯的龙石发光，认定瓦尔是菲格的驯龙师，因为她们之间已经建立了深厚的羁绊。
